summary: Iteration 38: Titan Glass Theme & Health Monitoring - All tests passed. Auth pages redesigned with dark slate right panel, glassmorphism buttons, Azure/Mint accents. Health monitoring endpoints working. Backend ai_core.py refactored into 4 sub-modules. CalibrationAdvisor.js uses useCalibrationState hook. Trust page has SEO meta tags.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: LoginSupabase.js - Titan Glass theme with dark SL (#1E293B) right panel, glassmorphism buttons, Azure (#007AFF) and Mint (#00D995) accents
PASS: RegisterSupabase.js - Same Titan Glass theme, all form fields present (name, email, company, industry, password)
PASS: health.py - New health monitoring endpoints /api/health/detailed and /api/health/workers properly registered
PASS: ai_core.py refactored - Now thin orchestrator (76 lines) delegating to business_context.py, cognitive_context.py, prompt_builder.py
PASS: CalibrationAdvisor.js refactored - Uses useCalibrationState custom hook (255 lines of state logic extracted)
PASS: TrustPage.js - SEO meta tags injected via useEffect (description, og:title, og:description, twitter:title)
PASS: OAuth buttons (Google, Microsoft) present on both auth pages
PASS: Cross-links work - Login has 'Sign up' link, Register has 'Sign in' link
PASS: Back to home links work on both auth pages

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, Titan Glass theme verified, navigation works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Titan Glass theme testing complete. Auth pages have dark right panel with glassmorphism effects. Health monitoring endpoints at /api/health/detailed and /api/health/workers return JSON with api, supabase, workers, integrations status. Backend refactoring maintained backward compatibility - ai_core.py re-exports from sub-modules.

backend_api.health_detailed: PASS - GET /api/health/detailed returns all status fields (api, supabase, workers, integrations, overall)
backend_api.health_workers: PASS - GET /api/health/workers returns email_sync and intelligence worker status
backend_api.login: PASS - POST /api/auth/supabase/login returns session with access_token
backend_api.calibration_status: PASS - GET /api/calibration/status returns 200 with valid token
backend_api.business_profile: PASS - GET /api/business-profile returns 200 with valid token

frontend.login_page: PASS - /login-supabase renders with Titan Glass theme, all form fields, OAuth buttons
frontend.register_page: PASS - /register-supabase renders with all 5 fields (name, email, company, industry, password)
frontend.trust_page: PASS - /trust loads with SEO meta tags (document.title = 'Trust & Data Sovereignty | BIQc')
frontend.landing_page: PASS - / loads with BIQc branding, Live Sentinel Feed
frontend.calibration_page: PASS - /calibration loads after authentication (shows loading/welcome state)
frontend.back_to_home_links: PASS - Both auth pages navigate to home
frontend.cross_links: PASS - Login -> Register and Register -> Login links work

refactoring_verification.ai_core_modules: PASS - ai_core.py (76 lines) + business_context.py + cognitive_context.py + prompt_builder.py
refactoring_verification.calibration_hook: PASS - CalibrationAdvisor.js uses useCalibrationState hook (extracted to /hooks/useCalibrationState.js)
